examples: They got scorched out by and by, and drearily set about getting breakfast.
Drearily sink into every silent night.
I didn't get the job, 'he said drearily.
Plans for spending and taxing more can be made to look drearily left-wing rather than intriguingly progressive.
But modern America has become a place so drearily confining and predictable that it chokes the life out of that built-in desire.
